_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder

title: Examples of Software
subtitle: Paint, Word & Video Player
overview: Students learn different examples of software such as Paint, Word and Video Player. They observe buttons, menus, icons and understand how software helps people perform different tasks on a computer.

images._note: Add classroom photos and screenshots of software interfaces.

gallery.caption: Paint software helps us draw and color pictures
Word software is used for typing documents
Video player software plays movies and songs
Students observing software icons on desktop

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Students using software in computer lab
gallery.caption: Students exploring software interfaces

keyTopics: Software tells the computer what to do
Paint software is used for drawing
Word software is used for typing
Video player is used for watching videos
Every software has buttons and menus
Icons help us open software easily
Software makes work faster and easier

youtubeVideos.title: What is Software?
youtubeVideos.desc: Simple explanation of software for beginners.

youtubeVideos.title: Microsoft Word Basics
youtubeVideos.desc: Basic typing and document creation in Word.

activity.title: Explore Different Software
steps: Draw a simple house or flower
Type your name and favorite color
Observe play, pause and volume buttons
Students identify different icons and menus

realLifeExamples: Paint is used to make drawings and posters
Word is used in schools and offices for typing
Video players are used to watch movies and cartoons
Games are software used for entertainment

options: Instructions that tell the computer what to do
quiz.explanation: Software gives instructions to the computer.

quiz.q: Which software is used for drawing pictures?
quiz.explanation: Paint software helps users draw and color pictures.

quiz.q: Which software is used for typing documents?
quiz.explanation: Word software is used for typing letters and documents.

quiz.q: What does a video player do?
quiz.explanation: Video player software helps us watch videos.

quiz.q: What do icons help us do?
quiz.explanation: Icons are small pictures used to open programs.
The Play button starts the video.

quiz.q: What can students do in Paint?
quiz.explanation: Paint software is made for drawing and coloring.

quiz.q: Which software helps students write homework on computer?
quiz.explanation: Word software is used for typing homework and notes.
Software helps people complete tasks easily and quickly.
